# Hey Jude's Lawn Care

> Professional lawn care and landscaping services in Rock Hill, SC and surrounding areas.

Hey Jude's Lawn Care provides weekly lawn mowing, mulch installation, yard cleanup, and landscaping services to residential and commercial customers in Rock Hill, Fort Mill, Tega Cay, Lake Wylie, and surrounding areas in South Carolina.

## Services

- [Lawn Mowing](https://heyjudeslawncare.com/lawn-mowing): Weekly and biweekly lawn mowing services starting at $40/visit for standard residential yards.
- [Mulch Installation](https://heyjudeslawncare.com/mulch-installation): Professional mulch delivery and installation for garden beds, trees, and landscaping areas.
- Yard Cleanup: Seasonal yard cleanup including leaf removal, debris clearing, and bed maintenance.
- Landscaping & Bed Refresh: Garden bed design, planting, and maintenance services.

## Service Area

Rock Hill, SC | Fort Mill, SC | Tega Cay, SC | Lake Wylie, SC | Indian Land, SC | Riverwalk | Newport, SC

## Contact

- Phone: (803) 902-7447
- Website: https://heyjudeslawncare.com
- Free quotes available at: https://heyjudeslawncare.com/#quote

## Reviews

5.0 stars with 130+ verified Google reviews.
